instructions: Read AGENTS.md and docs/architecture.md before generating code.
Follow the pnpm monorepo layout in docs/architecture.md.
Implement scanners using the Scanner interface; register in packages/agents/src/index.ts.
Every Finding must include aiFixPrompt via buildAiFixPrompt().
Use scanner IDs from docs/scanner-catalog.md only.
Non-destructive security probes only; redact secrets in evidence.
Follow Phase 0-4 implementation order in docs/architecture.md.
Minimal diffs; do not refactor unrelated code.
Every scan archives TOON to audits/ and git-commits by default; see docs/audit-archive.md.
Invoke the owning agent skill from skills/ before implementing scanners (see skills/registry.toon).
